hypothesis: Incorporating material-specific structural constraints directly into the molecular string representation (e.g., by developing a CTF-aware SELFIES variant that encodes symmetry group membership and cyclization potential as first-class tokens) will enable generative models pre-trained on general chemical databases to achieve higher percentages of filter-passing candidates through fine-tuning alone—without requiring reinforcement learning—thereby matching or exceeding the performance of combined fine-tuning plus reinforcement learning strategies while substantially reducing computational cost and eliminating policy collapse risk.
